'''竏喘-zh-g-v''' ('''kabazhgevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cutinise|cutinise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cutinise|cutinise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喘-zh-g-v
|-
! Lemma
| kabazhgevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibazhgevoko|thibazhgevoko]] || [[word:jibazhgevoko|jibazhgevoko]] || [[word:shibazhgevoko|shibazhgevoko]] || [[word:kibazhgevoko|kibazhgevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobazhgevoko|thobazhgevoko]] || [[word:jobazhgevoko|jobazhgevoko]] || [[word:shobazhgevoko|shobazhgevoko]] || [[word:kobazhgevoko|kobazhgevoko]]
|-

|-

|-
